feed.title: sbozich
feed.subtitle: This is a personal webpage outlining my thoughts about stuff I find interesting.

entry.title: TextMetricSEO — a browser-based word & phrase frequency analyzer

link.title: TextMetricSEO — a browser-based word & phrase frequency analyzer

entry.summary: I’ve published a new little web tool: TextMetricSEO — a privacy-friendly word and phrase frequency analyzer that works entirely in the browser. The idea is simple: sometimes you just want to paste a big text, see which words dominate, check whether you’re repeating a phrase too often, or quickly estimate keyword density for SEO — without signing up, sending the text to a server, or installing ...

entry.title: Linux Optimization & Security Manual (Zorin & Ubuntu-Based Systems)

link.title: Linux Optimization & Security Manual (Zorin & Ubuntu-Based Systems)

entry.summary: Field-tested, reversible tweaks for Zorin OS 17.3 / 18 and Ubuntu-based systems: performance, power, and security.

entry.title: The List Comparator is Online: Free Tool for Effortless Data Cleaning

link.title: The List Comparator is Online: Free Tool for Effortless Data Cleaning

entry.summary: Instantly compare, merge, and clean lists — right in your browser. Privacy-friendly, powerful, and built for speed.

entry.title: Understanding the CSS Cascade: How Styles are Applied in Web Development

link.title: Understanding the CSS Cascade&#58; How Styles are Applied in Web Development

entry.summary: Cascading Style Sheets (CSS) is a fundamental technology used to style the layout and appearance of web pages. One of the core concepts that developers need to understand when working with CSS is the CSS cascade. The cascade refers to the mechanism by which the browser determines which CSS rules to apply when multiple conflicting rules are defined. This process is central to ensuring that your ...

entry.title: Navigating tomorrow - How AI Will Reshape the Job Landscape in the Next 5 Years

link.title: Navigating tomorrow - How AI Will Reshape the Job Landscape in the Next 5 Years

entry.summary: The accelerated advancement of artificial intelligence (AI) has become an influential force shaping our world, particularly in the realm of employment. Over the next five years, the employment market is poised for a transformation that will be significantly driven by AI. From revolutionizing industries to redefining job roles, these changes are set to bring both opportunities and challenges. A...
